title: dicliptera minor
intro: Dicliptera minor, also known as 'Dwarf Billygoat Plume' or 'False Dragonhead', is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dicliptera minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and boost the immune system. Dicliptera minor can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
